revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:User:Nardog/TemplatePreviewGuard]]

revision.text:
{{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=TemplatePreviewGuard |desc=<onlyinclude>Warns when you try to use "Preview page with this template" with a page that doesn't transclude the template</onlyinclude> |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source=[[User:Nardog/TemplatePreviewGuard.js]] }}
Have you ever used the "Preview page with this template" feature and wondered why your changes weren't being reflected in the preview only to realize you were editing the wrong template? If you have, this script is for you. It'll show you a confirmation dialog if you click "Show preview" under "Preview page with this template" and the entered page doesn't transclude the page being edited.
==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]] or [[meta:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]]: <syntaxhighlight lang="javascript"> mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/TemplatePreviewGuard.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); </syntaxhighlight>
Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page.
==See also== *[[User:Nardog/AutoTestcases]] *[[phab:T279736]]
{{User:Nardog/scripts}}[[Category:reimport]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Nardog%2FTemplatePreviewGuard here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Nardog%2FTemplatePreviewGuard for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{historical}} {{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=TemplatePreviewGuard |desc=<onlyinclude>Warns when you try to use "Preview page with this template" with a page that doesn't transclude the template</onlyinclude> |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source=[[User:Nardog/TemplatePreviewGuard.js]] }}
Have you ever used the "Preview page with this template" feature and wondered why your changes weren't being reflected in the preview only to realize you were editing the wrong template? If you have, this script is for you. It'll show you a confirmation dialog if you click "Show preview" under "Preview page with this template" and the entered page doesn't transclude the page being edited.
==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]] or [[meta:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]]: <syntaxhighlight lang="javascript"> mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/TemplatePreviewGuard.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); </syntaxhighlight>
Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page.
==See also== *[[User:Nardog/AutoTestcases]] *[[phab:T279736]]
{{User:Nardog/scripts}}
